spec_match.rationale: Excellent compatibility validation. Runs actual CSS.supports() checks and outlines standard passive wheel fallbacks.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive: triggers live scroll checks, logs scrolling offsets dynamically, and tracks active/inactive state variables cleanly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the parent index.html blurb about compatibility lab.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully handles wheel events, logs thresholds, and resets state variables cleanly.

references.rationale: The page lacks a 'see also' reference links list and fails to cite the required ChromeStatus tracking link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms nicely, presenting neat grids, clean borders, consistent buttons, and a dark log panel.

openQuestions.title: Add references see also section with ChromeStatus link
openQuestions.detail: Add a see also links block at the bottom of the page citing the official ChromeStatus tracking link https://chromestatus.com/feature/5176802466201600 to satisfy showcase criteria.
